chapter_title.ar: بَابُ صَيْدِ الْحَرَمِ وَ مَا تَجِبُ فِيهِ الْكَفَّارَةُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 21 – Hunt of the Al-Harram and what expiation is Obligated with regards to it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/97)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/97)
text: هُ سُئِلَ عَنْ شَجَرَةٍ أَصْلُهَا فِي الْحَرَمِ وَ أَغْصَانُهَا فِي الْحِلِّ عَلَى غُصْنٍ مِنْهَا طَائِرٌ رَمَاهُ رَجُلٌ فَصَرَعَهُ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ جَزَاؤُهُ إِذَا كَانَ أَصْلُهَا فِي الْحَرَمِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, from his<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup>, from Ali<sup>asws</sup> having been asked about a tree, the root of which is in الْحَرَمِ (the Al-Harram), and its branches are in the unrestricted area, and upon a branch of it is a bird which a man pelted and felled it. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Upon him is its compensation, when its roots were inside ‘الْحَرَمِ’ the Al-Harram’.
en.sarwar: 29. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from al-Nawfaliy from al-Sakuniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has narrated that his father, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, was asked about the tree with its roots in al-Haram (the sacred area) and its branches in non-al-Haram (the sacred area) with a bird on it that was shot by a man that made it to fall down. He (the Imam) said, ‘He is required to pay the penalty if its root is in al-Haram (the sacred area).”’
